title: PACAC's inquiry into the wider standards landscape: Letter from Chair, CSPL, to Chair, PACAC
body: "Doug Chalmers CB DSO OBE, Chair, Committee on Standards in Public Life (CSPL) wrote to Simon Hoare MP, Chair, Parliamentary Administration and Constitutional Affairs Committee (PACAC), House of Commons, regarding PACAC’s inquiry into ‘propriety, ethics and the wider standards landscape in the UK’. "
